name: Cold open plays mid-sequence
detail: Cold-open overlay dialog present mid-sequence (01)

name: Cold open skips to briefing
detail: Skip control dismissed the overlay; landing and CTA in reach (02)

name: Mission select wall of dossiers
detail: 5 dossier links into missions rendered (03)

name: Mission briefing sequence
detail: Full-screen briefing overlay present on scenario entry (04)

name: Mission clock calm state
detail: Clock reads Condition green, T-minus countdown, burn-down bar (05)

name: Tactical (mid) alert state
detail: data-alert=mid; tactical amber strip "risk elevated · holding tactical" shown (06)

name: Full red-alert takeover
detail: data-alert=high; red banner "Red alert · risk critical" + alarm rail; clock Condition red=true (07)

name: Mission clock escalated state
detail: Clock escalates to Condition red under high alert (07)

name: Red-alert contrast AA (every text-on-bg pairing)
detail: 16 unique pairings measured; weakest normal text 4.82:1 (AA needs 4.5). Full table in contrast-red-alert.txt

name: Alert stands down as risk recedes
detail: After a lower-risk decision the red takeover stands down to tactical amber (data-alert=mid) (08)

name: Resolution climax: safe-rollout
detail: Verdict "Mission accomplished" streamed and landed for safe-rollout (09)

name: Debrief after-action file
detail: After-action debrief renders with report actions intact (14)

name: Resolution climax: minor-issue
detail: Verdict "fallout contained" streamed and landed for minor-issue (10)

name: Resolution climax: customer-incident
detail: Verdict "Mission compromised" streamed and landed for customer-incident (11)

name: Resolution climax: responsible-delay
detail: Verdict "Mission held" streamed and landed for responsible-delay (12)

name: Resolution climax: overcontrolled
detail: Verdict "Mission stalled" streamed and landed for overcontrolled (13)

name: 3D command-center hero mounts
detail: WebGL canvas mounted over the poster in the hero region (15)

name: Render loop runs only while visible
detail: 18 frames / 400ms while hero visible

name: Render loop pauses when tab hidden
detail: 0 frames / 400ms after emulating a hidden tab

name: Render loop pauses when hero offscreen
detail: 0 frames / 400ms after scrolling the hero offscreen

name: Hero fallback with WebGL disabled
detail: No WebGL canvas; the inline SVG poster stands alone (canvas=0, svgPoster=1) (16)

name: Mobile width landing
detail: Landing at 390px, no horizontal overflow=true (17)

name: Mobile width mission select
detail: Mission select wall reflows to one column at 390px, no horizontal overflow=true (18)

name: Reduced motion: cold open inert, final state
detail: No cold-open overlay (count=0); landing and CTA present and legible (19)

name: Reduced motion: 3D scene inert, poster final state
detail: No WebGL canvas (count=0); SVG poster shows the scene's final state (19)

name: Reduced motion: landing animations neutralized by computed style
detail: stage-in animation-duration neutralized to <=1ms by the global contract (19)

name: Reduced motion: briefing inert, workday final state
detail: No briefing overlay (count=0); the workday and clock present immediately (20)

name: Reduced motion: resolution inert, debrief final state
detail: No streaming resolution dialog (count=0); outcome and after-action report shown at once (21)

name: Keyboard: cold-open skip focused and operable
detail: Skip control auto-focused (true) and Enter dismissed the overlay (true)

name: Keyboard: primary CTA reachable with visible focus
detail: CTA focusable=true, focus-visible ring present (outline 2px solid)

name: Keyboard: briefing skip focused and operable
detail: Briefing skip auto-focused (true); Enter continued to the workday (true)

name: Every route returns 200
detail: / 200, /scenarios 200, /simulator/the-page 200, /simulator/just-add-a-button 200, /simulator/the-broken-build 200, /simulator/the-missing-requirement 200, /simulator/friday-deploy 200, /studio 200, /import 200, /compare 200, /run 200

name: Legacy /simulator redirect works
detail: /simulator resolved to /simulator/just-add-a-button (status 200)
